_note: Copy to stores.json, fill in real credentials the distributor issued you, then set STORES_CONFIG=stores.json in .env. Only stores listed here are ever queried (consent-first).

scrape._note: LAST RESORT. Only list sources you are permitted to read. Requires SCRAPE_ENABLED=true. Reads the store's PUBLIC products.json (Shopify-based stores).
scrape.name: Example Shopify Store
